summary: Verified BTC Overview bug fix - Verdict shows BULLISH ~78% (not HOLD), chart shows ~$151,866 (not $178K), Horizons table displays correct BULLISH percentages (30d +3.5%, 90d +13.5%, 180d +53.8%, 365d +130.9%). All horizon and asset switching works correctly.

minor.issue: SPX horizons return HOLD with 0% projection and 50% confidence - may need snapshot data
DXY horizons return HOLD with 0% projection and 50% confidence - may need snapshot data

minor.note: WebSocket connection errors in frontend console (non-blocking) - WS_ENABLED=false but frontend still attempts connections

issues: Confidence displays as 77.60000000000001% - should be formatted to 2 decimal places (77.60%)

passed_tests: BTC is default asset on Overview page
action_items: MINOR: Format confidence percentage to 2 decimal places in horizon table (77.60000000000001% → 77.6%)

success_rate.backend: 100% - All API endpoints return correct data

context_for_next_testing_agent: BTC Overview bug fix verified. Backend correctly converts confidence from 0-1 to 0-100 scale, and horizons data is populated from snapshot series. BTC uses crossAsset view by default. SPX/DXY show HOLD because they may not have proper snapshot data with projections.

verified_fixes.btc_horizons_table: VERIFIED - All 4 horizons show BULLISH with correct percentages
